definition: A lot of.

sentence.en: A good many people entered the building while you were talking.
sentence.uz: Siz gaplashayotganingizda binoga ancha-muncha (ko'p) odam kirdi.

definition: The phrase is said when there is some kind of emergency, and it requires everyone to work hard; something that takes a lot of effort.

sentence.en: It's been a bit of an all hands on deck effort organizing this meeting.
sentence.uz: Ushbu uchrashuvni tashkil qilish uchun barchaning birdek qattiq mehnat qilishi talab etildi.

definition: A situation that suddenly gets out of control and people start fighting or arguing.

sentence.en: When a fan at a rock concert jumped onto the stage, all hell broke loose.
sentence.uz: Rok-konsertda muxlislardan biri sahnaga sakrab chiqqanida, vaziyat to'satdan nazoratdan chiqib ketdi (g'alayon boshlandi).

definition: People of all social and economic classes.

sentence.en: In the 19th century, this game was played by all walks of life.
sentence.uz: 19-asrda bu o'yinni jamiyatning barcha qatlamlaridagi (har xil tabaqadagi) odamlar o'ynashgan.

definition: Extremely fast; very rapidly.

sentence.en: My friend talks a mile a minute about his cars.
sentence.uz: Do'stim mashinalari haqida juda tez (og'zi-og'ziga tegmay) gapiradi.

definition: A large amount; very much.

sentence.en: Our friend is completely devastated, and there is not an awful lot we can do about it, unfortunately.
sentence.uz: Do'stimiz butunlay tushkunlikda, afsuski, biz qila oladigan narsa juda kam.

definition: To emphasize that in a bad situation you will accept any help or take advantage of any opportunity.

sentence.en: Thanks, Dan! It's not an ideal solution, but hey, any port in a storm.
sentence.uz: Rahmat, Dan! Bu ideal yechim emas, lekin og'ir vaziyatda har qanday yordam yoki imkoniyat g'animat.

options: og'ir vaziyatda har qanday yordamning g'animatligi

definition: Something you deeply believe in.

sentence.en: This book is an article of faith for her.
sentence.uz: Bu kitob u ko'r-ko'rona va qattiq ishonadigan narsadir.

definition: With no significant difference; without any advantage; the same.

sentence.en: Hotel A is a little cheaper, but Hotel B has free breakfast, so it's as broad as it's long.
sentence.uz: A mehmonxona biroz arzonroq, lekin B mehmonxonada nonushta bepul, shuning uchun hech qanday farqi yo'q (baribir bir xil).

options: hech qanday farqi yo'q, bir xil

definition: Extremely drunk.

sentence.en: He was as drunk as a lord after the party.
sentence.uz: U ziyofatdan keyin bo'kib ichgan edi (juda mast edi).

word: As good a place as any
definition: Not perfect, but not worse than any other.

sentence.en: This hotel is as good a place as any to spend the night.
sentence.uz: Bu mehmonxona tunab qolish uchun eng zo'ri bo'lmasa-da, boshqalaridan yomon ham emas.

definition: Extremely excited, interested, or enthusiastic.

sentence.en: John got a job at a big company because he was as keen as mustard.
sentence.uz: Jon katta kompaniyaga ishga kirdi, chunki u juda g'ayratli va qiziquvchan edi.

definition: Extremely long.

sentence.en: My wife owes money to a list of people as long as my arm.
sentence.uz: Xotinimning qarzdorlar ro'yxati bir quchoq (juda uzun).

definition: In a state of weakness.

sentence.en: Our economy is now at a low ebb.
sentence.uz: Iqtisodiyotimiz hozirda zaif (pasayish) holatida.

definition: Finally; after a long wait.

sentence.en: At long last the pizza has arrived.
sentence.uz: Uzoq kutilgandan keyin, nihoyat, pitsa ham yetib keldi.

definition: A difficult period filled with problems and challenges.

sentence.en: Our team will definitely face a torrid time in tomorrow's game.
sentence.uz: Ertangi o'yinda jamoamiz albatta qiyin davrni (muammoli daqiqalarni) boshdan kechiradi.

definition: As soon as possible.

sentence.en: Please reply to my letter at your earliest convenience.
sentence.uz: Iltimos, imkon qadar tezroq xatimga javob bering.

definition: To avoid something as much as possible.

sentence.en: Rita's been avoiding me like the plague ever since I confessed my love.
sentence.uz: Sevgimni izhor qilganimdan beri Rita mendan o'zini uzoqqa olib qochadi (vabo kabi qochadi).

definition: To support something unsuccessful; make the wrong choice or decision.

sentence.en: You really backed the wrong horse when you bought this abandoned house.
sentence.uz: Bu tashlab ketilgan uyni sotib olib, mutlaqo noto'g'ri tanlov qildingiz (yutqazadigan tomonga tikdingiz).

definition: Follow the wrong course of action; doing something that will not produce the result you want.

sentence.en: If you expect me to solve all your financial problems, you are barking up the wrong tree.
sentence.uz: Agar barcha moliyaviy muammolaringizni men hal qilib beradi deb o'ylasangiz, mutlaqo yanglishyapsiz.

definition: To prepare for a difficult or unpleasant situation.

sentence.en: Many companies are battening down the hatches before the crisis.
sentence.uz: Ko'pgina kompaniyalar inqirozdan oldin qiyin vaziyatga tayyorgarlik ko'rishmoqda.

definition: Be very cheerful, sociable, and enjoyable.

sentence.en: My friend Joe is a real barrel of fun.
sentence.uz: Do'stim Jo haqiqiy quvnoq va suhbatdosh inson.

definition: Not knowing what to do; have nothing to do.

sentence.en: You can come and help me clean up if you're at a loose end.
sentence.uz: Agar bekor bo'lsang (nima qilishni bilmayotgan bo'lsang), kelib menga tozalashga yordam berishing mumkin.

definition: To defeat someone easily and thoroughly.

sentence.en: We scored an incredible 130 points per game and beat that team hollow.
sentence.uz: Biz har bir o'yinda aqlbovar qilmas 130 ochko to'pladik va u jamoani osongina, batamom mag'lub etdik.

definition: Being overwhelmed by strong feelings or emotions; unable to think clearly or control oneself.

sentence.en: Tanya was beside herself with grief when her husband died.
sentence.uz: Eri vafot etganida, Tanya qayg'udan o'zini yo'qotib qo'ygan edi (kuchli his-tuyg'ular ostida edi).

options: o'zini yo'qotib qo'yish, kuchli his-tuyg'uda bo'lish

definition: To do something extremely inefficient or unproductive.

sentence.en: I need to start taking only effective steps towards my goal and stop chasing my own tail.
sentence.uz: Men maqsadim sari faqat samarali qadamlar tashlashni boshlashim va samarasiz ishlarga vaqt sarflashni to'xtatishim kerak.

options: samarasiz, samarasiz ishlar bilan ovora bo'lish

definition: Excellent; of a very high standard; ideal.

sentence.en: This new TV show is the bee's knees.
sentence.uz: Bu yangi teleko'rsatuv shunchaki daxshat (ajoyib, oliy darajada).

definition: Prepare to be punished; to warn someone that you will punish them if they do something wrong/illegal.

sentence.en: If I catch you stealing, you'll be for the high jump.
sentence.uz: Agar seni o'g'rilik ustida tutib olsam, jazoyingni olasan (jazolanishga tayyor tur).

definition: Right in front you; while you are watching.

sentence.en: Before your very eyes, I will make this ball disappear.
sentence.uz: Ko'z o'ngingizda men bu to'pni yo'q qilib yuboraman.

definition: Impossible or not worth believing; impossible to describe or explain.

sentence.en: It almost beggars belief that you completed the project on your own.
sentence.uz: Loyihani yolg'iz o'zingiz tugatganingizga ishonish qiyin (aqlga sig'maydi).

definition: To be in a difficult or tough situation.

sentence.en: With funding being cut, my science project is in a tight corner.
sentence.uz: Moliyalashtirish qisqartirilgach, mening ilmiy loyiham qiyin ahvolda qoldi.

definition: To get into serious trouble.

sentence.en: Having lost all his savings in the casino, he is now in deep water.
sentence.uz: Kazino barcha jamg'armalarini yutqazib qo'ygach, u hozir jiddiy muammoga duch keldi (chuqur botqoqqa botdi).

definition: To be involved in a difficult, dangerous, or unpleasant situation that you cannot handle due to lack of strength, knowledge, or experience.

sentence.en: No, you can't beat them! You are in over your head and you know it.
sentence.uz: Yo'q, ularni yuta olmaysan! Bu sening qo'lingdan kelmaydigan, tishing o'tmaydigan ish va buni o'zing ham bilasan.

options: qo'lidan kelmaydigan, tajribasizlik qiladigan qiyin vaziyatda bo'lish

definition: To be in serious trouble.

sentence.en: If Tony and his wife find out what you've done, you'll be in the soup.
sentence.uz: Agar Toni va uning xotini nima qilganingni bilib qolishsa, boshing baloda qoladi (jiddiy muammoga duch kelasan).

definition: Do some extra actions to make sure something is safe; providing double security.

sentence.en: I set an alarm on my phone, tablet, and watch - belt and braces, I admit.
sentence.uz: Men telefonimga, planshetimga va soatimga budilnik qo'ydim - bu ortiqcha ehtiyotkorlik (ikki karra xavfsizlik) ekanini tan olaman.

options: ikki karra xavfsizlik chorasi, ortiqcha ehtiyotkorlik

word: Be on the best of terms with someone
definition: To have a good/excellent relationship with someone.

sentence.en: I'm not on the best of terms with Dan at the moment.
sentence.uz: Hozirda Dan bilan munosabatlarim unchalik yaxshi emas.

definition: Very nervous, excited, and thrilled because you are wondering what is going to happen in a specific situation.

sentence.en: We were on tenterhooks all evening waiting for the big news.
sentence.uz: Katta yangilikni kutib, butun oqshom davomida igna ustida o'tirdik (juda asabiylashdik/hayajonlandik).

definition: To be at the time when a situation/condition is going to change.

sentence.en: We're on the very cusp of the new world.
sentence.uz: Biz yangi dunyoning (yangi o'zgarishlarning) ostonasida turibmiz.

definition: To be in a difficult or bad situation.

sentence.en: Their family business seems to be on the skids.
sentence.uz: Ularning oilaviy biznesi inqirozga yuz tutayotganga (yomon ahvoldalikka) o'xshaydi.

options: inqirozga yuz tutish, yomon ahvolda bo'lik

word: Between the devil and the deep blue sea
definition: In a bad situation with two equally unpleasant options.

sentence.en: With all my debts, I'm really between the devil and the deep blue sea.
sentence.uz: Barcha qarzlarim bilan ikki o't orasida (og'ir chorasiz vaziyatda) qoldim.

options: ikki o't orasida qolish, chorasiz qolish

definition: A fault or mistake that ruins someone's reputation; something that spoils something.

sentence.en: This incident is a serious blot on our family name.
sentence.uz: Bu voqea oilamiz nomiga tushgan qora dog'dir (obro'ni to'kadigan xato).

word: Blow something out of the water
definition: Completely destroy, ruin, or defeat someone/something.

sentence.en: These terrible reviews from the critics will blow my restaurant out of the water.
sentence.uz: Tanqidchilarning bu daxshatli sharhlari mening restoranimni butunlay yakson qiladi (yer bilan bitta qiladi).

definition: Something that people argue about; subject of a disagreement.

sentence.en: The main bone of contention between us is money.
sentence.uz: O'rtamizdagi asosiy nizo predmeti (g'alva/talash manbai) bu - pul.

definition: To contribute; to provide something useful to others in your group; bring up for discussion.

sentence.en: Our new worker will bring many important skills to the table.
sentence.uz: Yangi xodimimiz o'zi bilan birga ko'plab muhim ko'nikmalarni olib keladi (jamoaga foyda keltiradi).

definition: To work/read/study late into the night.

sentence.en: I have to burn the midnight oil to finish my homework.
sentence.uz: Uy vazifasini tugatish uchun yarim kechagacha mijja qoqmay ishlashim/o'qishim kerak.

definition: Extremely full or crowded.

sentence.en: When the whole family comes home for Christmas, our house is bursting at the seams.
sentence.uz: Rojdestvoda butun oila uyga kelganida, uyimiz liq to'la (odam bilan limmo-lim) bo'lib ketadi.

definition: To end someone's illusions, dreams, beliefs, or hopes by telling them the truth.

sentence.en: I don't want to burst your bubble, but she's gone and won't come back to you.
sentence.uz: Sening shirin xayollaringni barbod qilmoqchi emasman-u, lekin u ketgan va senga qaytib kelmaydi.

definition: To emphasize that you are very surprised or excited.

sentence.en: Will you, by jove? Well, get on with it then!
sentence.uz: Rostdanmi, voy xudo-ye! Unda davom eta qol!

options: juda hayratda qolganda yoki hayajonlanganda ishlatiladigan xitob

definition: Extremely fast.

sentence.en: His English is improving by leaps and bounds.
sentence.uz: Uning ingliz tili juda tez (katta qadamlar bilan) yaxshilanmoqda.

definition: To prevent further activity; to prevent something from continuing.

sentence.en: She decided to pull the plug on her research.
sentence.uz: U o'z tadqiqotini to'xtatishga (davom etishiga yo'l qo'ymaslikka) qaror qildi.

definition: To regard a bad, difficult, or unpleasant situation as a learning experience rather than a punishment.

sentence.en: Everyone makes mistakes, don't worry so much and put it down to experience.
sentence.uz: Hamma xato qiladi, ko'p siqilavermang, buni shunchaki bir tajriba (saboq) deb qabul qiling.

options: buni bir hayotiy tajriba/saboq deb bilish

definition: To clarify something for someone; to tell someone about something.

sentence.en: Tommy put me wise to the situation and we started negotiations.
sentence.uz: Tommi menga vaziyatni tushuntirdi (ko'zimni ochdi) va biz muzokaralarni boshladik.

definition: To successfully deal with something; to finish work on something.

sentence.en: Let's just put the issue to bed and stop arguing!
sentence.uz: Keling, yaxshisi bu masalani uzil-kesil hal qilaylik (yopaylik) va janjallashishni to'xtataylik!

options: masalani uzil-kesil hal qilish, ishni muvaffaqiyatli yakunlash

word: Put the cart before the horse
definition: To do something in the wrong order.

sentence.en: Aren't you putting the cart before the horse by choosing a wedding venue before the actual proposal?
sentence.uz: Hali taklif qilmasdan turib to'yxona tanlash bilan ishni teskari (noto'g'ri ketma-ketlikda) qilmangmi?

options: aravani otning oldiga qo'yish (ishni teskari/noto'g'ri tartibda qilish)

definition: Heavy rain.

sentence.en: Better stay at home, it's raining cats and dogs outside.
sentence.uz: Yaxshisi uyda qolgan ma'qul, tashqarida chelaklab yomg'ir yog'yapti.

definition: To do something that ruins someone's plans; dampen one's excitement.

sentence.en: I hate to rain on your parade, but I think your name on the list is just a typo.
sentence.uz: Quvonchingizni (rejangizni) chippakka chiqarishni xohlamayman-u, lekin sizning ismingiz ro'yxatga xato tufayli kirib qolgan shekilli.

options: birovning kayfiyatini yoki rejasini chippakka chiqarish/barbod qilish

definition: To do something unwise and reckless that will lead to failure or injury.

sentence.en: Nina's riding for a fall with the dubious investments she's been making lately.
sentence.uz: Nina oxirgi vaqtlarda kiritayotgan shubhali investisiyalari bilan o'z boshiga balo qidirmoqda (halokat sari ketmoqda).

options: o'z boshiga balo qidirish, halokat/omadsizlikka olib keladigan ahmoqona ish qilish

definition: To cheat someone and take their money; to steal everything someone owns.

sentence.en: You are trying to rob me blind with that price. I won't buy it!
sentence.uz: Bu narx bilan siz meni shishib (borimni shilib) olmoqchisiz. Men buni sotib olmayman!

options: borini shilib olish, aldab bor pulini tortib olish

definition: A difficult/challenging period.

sentence.en: The rocky road to the championship.
sentence.uz: Chempionlikka olib boradigan qiyinchiliklarga to'la (toshloq) yo'l.

definition: To spend time with someone.

sentence.en: She loves rubbing shoulders with the rich and famous.
sentence.uz: U boylar va mashhurlar davrasida bo'lishni (ular bilan aralashib yurishni) yaxshi ko'radi.

definition: To curse or bitterly regret a moment in your life; to be very sorry for something.

sentence.en: When I find him, he'll rue the day he was born!
sentence.uz: Uni topsam, tug'ilgan kuniga la'nat aytadi (qattiq pushaymon bo'ladi)!

options: kunga la'nat aytish, qattiq pushaymon bo'lish

word: Said the pot to the kettle
definition: A witty remark to someone who says something bad/insulting about another person, when they themselves are guilty of the same thing.

sentence.en: He is so arrogant! - Said the pot to the kettle.
sentence.uz: U shunchalik kibrli-ki! - Qozon qorani ko'rib, o'zini oqlabdi (o'zing ham shunaqasan-ku).

options: o'zi ham shu aybga ega bo'la turib boshqani ayblash (qozon qorani ko'ribdi)

definition: To do something dangerous, risky, illegal, or unacceptable.

sentence.en: The illegal tobacco company was sailing close to the wind.
sentence.uz: Noqonuniy tamaki kompaniyasi xavfli (qonun buzilishi) yoqasida turgan edi.

options: qonun yoki xavf yoqasida turadigan tavakkal ish qilish

definition: To save something for later.

sentence.en: Don't worry about the expenses, I have fifty thousand pounds salted away for that.
sentence.uz: Xarajatlardan xavotirlanmang, menda buning uchun yig'ib (yashirib) qo'yilgan ellik ming funt bor.

options: kelajak uchun pul yoki narsa yig'ib/yashirib qo'yish

definition: To state your opinion; to say what you want to say.

sentence.en: Stop glaring at us! Just say your piece about the incident.
sentence.uz: Bizga o'qrayishni to'xtat! Hodisa haqida o'z fikringni ayt (aytagan gapingni aytib ol).

options: o'z fikrini/aytmoqchi bo'lgan gapini aytib olish

definition: To consider proper or desirable.

sentence.en: When you find this fraudster, deal with him however you see fit.
sentence.uz: Ushbu firibgarlarni topganingizda, unga o'zingiz to'g'ri deb bilganingizcha chora ko'ring.

options: lozim deb topish, o'zi to'g'ri deb bilish

definition: To come into existence; first time to appear.

sentence.en: This video game first saw the light of day in 2005.
sentence.uz: Bu video o'yin birinchi marta 2005-yilda dunyo yuzini ko'rgan (ommaga taqdim etilgan).

options: dunyo yuzini ko'rish, birinchi marta paydo bo'lish/chiqish

definition: To emphasize that someone deserves all the bad things that happen to them.

sentence.en: He is in trouble with the law again. - It serves him right!
sentence.uz: U yana qonun bilan muammoga duch keldi. - Unga shu ham kam (boshiga tushgan muammoga loyiq)!

options: unga shu ham kam, jazosiga loyiq

definition: Help someone to calm down/stop worrying.

sentence.en: He could set her mind at ease by telling her the truth.
sentence.uz: U haqiqatni aytib, uning ko'nglini joyiga tushirishi (tinchlantirishi) mumkin edi.

definition: To start a process/series of events.

sentence.en: By not taking their money, you set the bankruptcy in motion.
sentence.uz: Ularning pulini olmaslik bilan siz bankrotlik jarayonini boshlab yubordingiz.

definition: To punish or harm someone for something bad that they did to you in the past; take revenge; pay the debt off.

sentence.en: Yes, I will join the fight; I have some scores to settle with them.
sentence.uz: Ha, men jangga qo'shilaman; ular bilan hisob-kitob qilib oladigan (o'ch oladigan) gapim bor.

options: eski adovat uchun hisob-kitob qilib olish, o'ch olish

definition: Not as good, powerful, or capable as before.

sentence.en: Three years after her injury, she returned but was only a shadow of her former self.
sentence.uz: Jarohatidan uch yil o'tib u qaytdi, lekin avvalgi o'zining soyasi xolos edi (avvalgi kuch-quvvati yo'q edi).

options: avvalgi holatidan asar ham qolmagan, kuchsizlanib qolgan bo'lish

definition: To provide additional/missing information about something.

sentence.en: Hopefully these documents will shed some light on her past.
sentence.uz: Umid qilamizki, bu hujjatlar uning o'tmishiga biroz oydinlik kiritadi.

definition: Easy target; someone who is very easy for the enemy to attack.

sentence.en: Without body armor and a helmet, I am a sitting duck for the enemy.
sentence.uz: Bronijilet va dubulg'asiz men dushman uchun oson o'lja (tayyor nishon)man.

definition: To be in a good, comfortable, privileged, or favored position.

sentence.en: Cariba really is sitting pretty with her new job as CEO.
sentence.uz: Yangi bosh direktorlik ishi bilan Kariba chindan ham qulay va imtiyozli joyni egallab oldi.

options: qulay, foydali yoki yuqori mavqeda bo'lish

definition: Something that was said by accident/mistakenly.

sentence.en: Did I call you Rachel? It must have been a slip of the tongue.
sentence.uz: Sizni Reychel deb chaqirdimmi? Tilim toyib ketgan bo'lsa kerak (tasodifan adashib aytdim).

options: tili toyib ketishi, yanglishib gapirib yuborish

definition: Not surprising.

sentence.en: It's small wonder the kids are bored.
sentence.uz: Bolalarning zerikib qolgani ajablanarli emas (tabiiy hol).

definition: To improve your behavior; make more of an effort.

sentence.en: He'll have to smarten up his act if he needs me as an ally.
sentence.uz: Agar u meni ittifoqchi sifatida ko'rmoqchi bo'lsa, o'z xulq-atvorini yaxshilashi kerak.

options: o'z xulq-atvorini/harakatini yaxshilash, ko'proq harakat qilish

definition: General state of life; general situation in life.

sentence.en: John seems happy enough with his lot in life.
sentence.uz: Jon o'zining hayotiy qismati (peshana taqdiri) bilan yetarlicha baxtli ko'rinadi.

definition: To separate from the greater part of something; to separate from a larger group.

sentence.en: A small group splintered off from the main camp.
sentence.uz: Kichik bir guruh asosiy lagerdan ajralib chiqdi.

options: kattaroq guruh yoki narsadan ajralib chiqish

definition: To force someone to do or give something (mostly information).

sentence.en: It's a shame we couldn't squeeze anything out of Dan and his accomplices.
sentence.uz: Dand va uning jinoiy sheriklaridan biror ma'lumot sug'urib (majburlab ololmaganimiz) achinarli.

options: majburlab ma'lumot yoki biror narsani sug'urib/undirib olish

definition: To refuse to change your opinion; continue to support a particular position or point of view in an argument; to stay where you are when someone threatens or intimidates you.

sentence.en: Our meeting was unsuccessful because Harry stood his ground.
sentence.uz: Uchrashuvimiz muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi, chunki Harri o'z so'zida turib oldi (ortga chekinmadi).

options: o'z fikrida/so'zida qat'iy turib olish, ortga chekinmaslik

definition: To stop the growth or continuation of something.

sentence.en: These strict measures are designed to stem the tide of illegal immigration.
sentence.uz: Ushbu qat'iy choralar noqonuniy immigrasiya oqimini to'xtatish (oldini olish) uchun mo'ljallangan.

definition: To hear information from someone who knows for sure that it's true (mainly because that person has personally seen or heard something that confirms the accuracy of the information).

sentence.en: John already told me, but I'd like to hear it straight from the horse's mouth.
sentence.uz: Jon menga aytdi, lekin buni birinchi manbaning o'zidan (haqiqiy guvohidan) eshitishni xohlardim.

definition: To make every possible effort; do the best you can.

sentence.en: I will strain every nerve to finish the book on time.
sentence.uz: Kitobni vaqtida tugatish uchun bor kuch-g'ayratimni ishga solaman.

options: bor kuch-g'ayratini ishga solish, jon-jahdi bilan urinish

definition: Without any doubt; for certain.

sentence.en: Are you sure you are pregnant? - Sure as eggs is eggs!
sentence.uz: Homiladorligingizga aminsizmi? - Ikki karra ikki to'rtdek aniq (shubhasiz)!

options: ikki karra ikki to'rtdek aniq, shubhasiz

definition: To deliberately ignore a problem/issue in the hope that it will be overlooked or forgotten.

sentence.en: You can't just sweep your financial problems under the carpet.
sentence.uz: Moliyaviy muammolaringizni shunchaki xaspo'shlay (beparvo bo'lib yashira) olmaysiz.

definition: To win everything possible.

sentence.en: My team swept the board in the boxing competition.
sentence.uz: Mening jamoam boks musobaqasida barcha sovrinlarni yutib oldi (katta g'alabaga erishdi).

options: barcha mumkin bo'lgan sovrinlarni/g'alabalarni qo'lga kiritish

definition: To understand something that is suggested or offered to you indirectly.

sentence.en: I'd love to go out, but my knee hurts. - Okay, I can take a hint.
sentence.uz: Aylangani chiqardim-u, lekin tizzam og'riyapti. - Mayli, ishorangizni tushundim (majburlamayman).

definition: To emphasize that you are absolutely sure of what you are saying.

sentence.en: You can take it from me, he's a wonderful man.
sentence.uz: Mening gapimga ishoning (so'zimga shubha qilmang), u ajoyib inson.

word: Take matters into your own hands
definition: To do something yourself because others have refused or failed.

sentence.en: They failed to eliminate the target, so he took matters into his own hands.
sentence.uz: Ular nishonni yo'q qila olishmadi, shuning uchun u ishni o'z qo'liga oldi.

options: ishni o'z qo'liga olish (o'zi mustaqil bajarish)

definition: To agree/accept that something is true without any evidence.

sentence.en: We took it as read that he was a spy.
sentence.uz: Biz uning josus ekanligini hujjatsiz/isbotsiz to'g'ri deb qabul qildik.

word: Take the bull by the horns
definition: To confidently deal with a dangerous or difficult situation.

sentence.en: It's time to take the bull by the horns and fire inefficient employees.
sentence.uz: Bu qiyinchilikka qarshi mardona turish (buqani shoxidan tutish) va samarasiz xodimlarni bo'shatish vaqti keldi.

options: buqani shoxidan tutish (qiyinchilikka qarshi mardona/keskin kurashish)

definition: A request or task that is extremely difficult to complete.

sentence.en: Completing this task on time was a tall order, but we did it.
sentence.uz: Bu vazifani vaqtida bajarish o'ta qiyin vazifa (bajarib bo'lmas buyurtma) edi, lekin biz buni uddaladik.

options: bajarish o'ta qiyin/murakkab bo'lgan vazifa yoki buyurtma

definition: To be extremely grateful.

sentence.en: You should thank your lucky stars that you managed to survive the accident.
sentence.uz: Baxtingiz bor ekan (omadli yulduzingizga rahmat ayting), baxtsiz hodisadan omon qoldingiz.

options: omadi chopganiga shukr qilish, o'ta minnatdor bo'lish

word: That's one way of putting it
definition: To emphasize that someone said something completely different from the intended meaning of their words (mostly in a sarcastic or flirty manner).

sentence.en: You look really hot! - Well, that's one way of putting it.
sentence.uz: Juda jozibali ko'rinyapsiz! - Shunday desangiz ham bo'ladi (shunaqa tushunish mumkin).

options: buni shunday tushunsa ham bo'ladi (shunday ta'riflash ham mumkin)

definition: To emphasize that something has not yet been decided/answered.

sentence.en: The jury is still out on whether red wine can be good for you.
sentence.uz: Qizil vinoning foydasi bor-yo'qligi bo'yicha yakuniy qaror hali qabul qilinmagan (masala ochiq qolmoqda).

options: yakuniy qaror qabul qilinmagan, masala hali ham ochiq

definition: Bigger half; largest part.

sentence.en: I spend the lion's share of my salary on rent.
sentence.uz: Maoshimning sher ulushini (eng katta qismini) ijaraga sarflayman.

definition: To emphasize that something happened so long ago that you barely remember it.

sentence.en: The origins of this phrase are lost in the mists of history.
sentence.uz: Bu iboraning kelib chiqishi tarix qa'rida (unutilgan uzoq o'tmishda) yo'qolib ketgan.

definition: To emphasize that more people will make the event or activity more enjoyable.

sentence.en: Can I bring my brother to your party? - Sure, the more the merrier!
sentence.uz: Akamni ham ziyofatga olib kelsam bo'ladimi? - Albatta, qancha ko'p bo'lsak, shuncha quvnoq bo'ladi!

definition: Impossible to know for sure.

sentence.en: If he fails in negotiations, there's no telling how many people will lose their jobs.
sentence.uz: Agar u muzokaralarda yutqazsa, qancha odam ishsiz qolishini bashorat qilib (aniq bilib) bo'lmaydi.

word: There's no time like the present
definition: To emphasize that now is the best time to do something.

sentence.en: When would you like to meet? - There's no time like the present.
sentence.uz: Qachon ko'rishishni xohlaysiz? - Hozirgisi eng yaxshi vaqt (kechiktirishga hojat yo'q).

options: hozirgi vaqt eng yaxshisi ekanligi (ishni darhol bajarish kerakligi)

definition: To emphasize that when you are in a large group with other people, you are less likely to be harmed.

sentence.en: We must stick together in the woods; there's safety in numbers.
sentence.uz: O'rmonda birga bo'lishimiz kerak; ko'pchilik bo'lsa xavfsiz bo'ladi (ko'pda baraka).

definition: Exhausted; tired; in poor condition; beaten up from use.

sentence.en: Your jacket seems to be the worse for wear - I'll buy you a new one.
sentence.uz: Kamzulingiz urinib qolibdi (eskirib, holati yomonlashibdi) - sizga yangisini sotib olaman.

options: charchagan, eskirgan yoki holati yomonlashgan bo'lish

word: Throw a spanner in the works
definition: To prevent things from going as planned (mainly by causing problems or difficulties).

sentence.en: I was ready to publish my novel when my sister threw a spanner in the works by deleting the file.
sentence.uz: Men romanomni nashr etishga tayyor edim, lekin singlim faylni o'chirib tashlab, ishimni chippakka chiqardi (g'ildirakka cho'p suqdi).

options: ishni chippakka chiqarish, g'ildirakka cho'p suqish

definition: To destroy someone's enthusiasm for something; be extremely pessimistic about someone's plans or ideas.

sentence.en: You're always throwing cold water on my new ideas!
sentence.uz: Siz har doim mening yangi g'oyalarimga sovuq suv quyasiz (shijoatimni so'ndirasiz)!

options: shijoatni so'ndirish, g'oyaga nisbatan o'ta pessimistik munosabatda bo'lish

definition: To deal with little issues/problems left unresolved from something; to complete minor matters that are the result of a previous action.

sentence.en: All that remained was to tie up loose ends after the project.
sentence.uz: Loyihadan keyin faqat mayda-chuyda hal qilinmagan masalalarni yakunlash (oxiriga yetkazish) qoldi.

options: mayda-chuyda, qolib ketgan masalalarni yakunlash/hal qilish

definition: For a long period of time.

sentence.en: You can convince me till the cows come home, but I won't change my mind.
sentence.uz: Meni sigirlar uyga kelguncha (juda uzoq vaqt) ko'ndirishga urinishing mumkin, lekin barbir fikrimni o'zgartirmayman.

options: juda uzoq vaqt davomida, cheksiz ravishda

definition: Fitting someone's preferences; enjoyable to someone.

sentence.en: Is everything to your liking, thus far?
sentence.uz: Hozircha hamma narsa sizga yoqadigan darajadami (didingizga mosmi)?

definition: Without special knowledge of the subject.

sentence.en: To the untrained eye, it looks like a stack of old papers, but it is an original manuscript.
sentence.uz: Mutaxassis bo'lmagan (oddiy) odam ko'ziga bu shunchaki eski qog'ozlar uyumi bo'lib ko'rinadi, lekin bu asl qo'lyozmadir.

options: mutaxassis bo'lmagan, maxsus bilimsiz odam nazarida

definition: Someone or something so successful, exemplary, or effective that it overshadows anything that follows.

sentence.en: John was a tough act to follow - a Nobel laureate with 40 years of experience.
sentence.uz: Jondan keyin uning o'rnini bosish o'ta qiyin (chunki u 40 yillik tajribaga ega Nobel mukofoti sovrindori).

options: o'rnini bosish yoki ortidan yetishish juda qiyin bo'lgan yuksak namuna/shaxs

definition: As long as you wish; as much as you want.

sentence.en: His wife let him eat and drink to his heart's content.
sentence.uz: Xotini unga ko'ngli tusaganicha (to'yguncha) yeb-ichishga ruxsat berdi.

definition: To treat someone/something very gently and carefully; be extremely polite and kind.

sentence.en: She needs to be handled with kid gloves; she is very sensitive.
sentence.uz: Unga juda ham muloyim va ehtiyotkorona munosabatda bo'lish kerak; u juda ta'sirchan.

options: o'ta muloyim, ehtiyotkorona va muloyim munosabatda bo'lish

definition: A dangerous or difficult situation is developing.

sentence.en: The informant made it clear that trouble was brewing.
sentence.uz: Informator (gofchi) yaqin orada ko'ngilsizlik/xavf yetilib kelayotganini aniq tushuntirdi.

definition: Behaving in expected or predictable manner; as usual.

sentence.en: True to form, Rita and Sam are late again.
sentence.uz: O'z odatiga ko'ra (kutilganidek), Rita va Sem yana kechikishdi.

options: o'z odatiga ko'ra, kutilganidek, har doimgidek

definition: To do something for the first time.

sentence.en: I've always wanted to try my hand at scuba diving.
sentence.uz: Men har doim akvalang bilan suzishni o'zimda sinab ko'rishni (birinchi marta urunishni) xohlaganman.

options: biror ishni birinchi marta o'zida sinab ko'rmoq/urinmoq

definition: Very late; until a very late hour.

sentence.en: We were up talking until all hours.
sentence.uz: Biz yarim kechagacha (juda kech bo'lguncha) gaplashib o'tirdik.

options: yarim kechagacha, tun yarmigacha o'ta kech vaqt

definition: Until the situation becomes calmer.

sentence.en: You've caused a lot of trouble, and we'll have to leave town until the dust settles.
sentence.uz: Siz ko'p muammo yaratdingiz, vaziyat tinchiguncha (chang bosilguncha) shahardan chiqib turishimiz kerak.

options: vaziyat tinchiguncha, hamma narsa o'z joyiga tushguncha

word: Walk with a spring in your step
definition: Walk energetically and happily.

sentence.en: As Rita walked into the school, there was a spring in her step.
sentence.uz: Maktabga kirib borarkan, Ritaning qadamlarida quvonch va g'ayrat sezilib turardi (baxtiyor qadam tashlardi).

options: quvnoq va g'ayrat bilan (baxtiyor) qadam tashlash

definition: Something that happened a long time ago and doesn't bother you anymore.

sentence.en: I forgive you, that old quarrel is just water under the bridge!
sentence.uz: Seni kechiraman, u eski janjal endi o'tmishda qoldi (o'tgan ishga salovot)!

options: o'tmishda qolgan, ahamiyatini yo'qotgan voqea (o'tgan ishga salovot)

definition: When a situation becomes critical and you need to act; when a decision needs to be made; when something can no longer be ignored.

sentence.en: Only Bella was there to help me when push came to shove.
sentence.uz: Vaziyat o'ta jiddiylashganda (pichoq suyakka taqalganda) faqat Bella menga yordam berdi.

options: vaziyat o'ta jiddiylashganda, pichoq suyakka taqalganda

definition: Successfully.

sentence.en: He passed his college entrance exam with flying colours.
sentence.uz: U kollejga kirish imtihonidan o'ta muvaffaqiyatli (g'olibona) o'tdi.

definition: All together; in full agreement; at the same time.

sentence.en: With one accord they left the room.
sentence.uz: Ular bir ovozdan (birdaniga/hammasi kelishgan holda) xonani tark etishdi.

options: bir ovozdan, yakdillik bilan, bir vaqtda

definition: Smoothly, easily, without any difficulties or problems.

sentence.en: The knee surgery went off without a hitch.
sentence.uz: Tizza jarrohligi hech qanday muammosiz (silliq) o'tib ketdi.

definition: Something that is worth your attention/time and you can gain some benefit or advantage from it.

sentence.en: Is it really worth your while to keep looking for that necklace? - Yes, it is a family heirloom.
sentence.uz: U marjonni qidirishga vaqt sarflash arziydimi? - Ha, u oilaviy meros.

options: vaqt va e'tibor ajratishga arziydigan (foydali/manfaatli) ish
